infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Share your precise location with your family in real time.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Keep sharing your location in the background so your family stays updated even when Famrak is closed.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: Keep sharing your location in the background so your family stays updated.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Famrak uses your precise location to share it with your approved family members in real time, including when the app is in the background.
plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Famrak uses your precise location to share it with your approved family members.
